testcase.name: Joining a room returns stable room key material for all members

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.error:
Failing step: And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.008s Location: features/crypto_contract.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\model.py", line 1991, in run match.run(runner.context) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\matchers.py", line 105, in run self.func(context, *args, **kwargs) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "features\steps\connection_steps.py", line 77, in step_connect_client client.connect() ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\src\phantomchat_blackbox\socket_client.py", line 39, in connect self._socket = websocket.create_connection(self.url, timeout=self.timeout_seconds, **options) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_core.py", line 664, in create_connection websock.connect(url, **options) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_core.py", line 268, in connect self.handshake_response = handshake(self.sock, url, *addrs, **options) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_handshake.py", line 66, in handshake status, resp = _get_resp_headers(sock) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^ File "C:\Programming\My source\PhantomChat.BlackboxTestBDD\.venv\Lib\site-packages\websocket\_handshake.py", line 158, in _get_resp_headers raise WebSocketBadStatusException( ...<5 lines>... ) websocket._exceptions.WebSocketBadStatusException: Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b'\r\nNot Found\r\n\r\n

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

\r\n
Cannot open document for: /room
\r\n\r\n\r\n'
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Joining a room returns stable room key material for all members Given a unique room alias "crypto_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.008s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s When client "alice" joins room "crypto_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "alice" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | room_created | true | | room_name | crypto_room | And the response field "room_key" for client "alice" should not be empty ... skipped in 0.000s And the response field "room_key" for client "alice" should match regex "^[0-9a-f]{64}$" ... skipped in 0.000s When client "bob" joins room "crypto_room" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "bob" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 0 | | room_created | false | | room_name | crypto_room | And the response field "room_key" for client "bob" should match regex "^[0-9a-f]{64}$" ... skipped in 0.000s And the response field "room_key" for clients "alice" and "bob" should be equal ... skipped in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Different rooms expose different room key material

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Different rooms expose different room key material Given a unique room alias "crypto_room_one" ... passed in 0.000s And a unique room alias "crypto_room_two" ... passed in 0.000s And WebSocket client "alice" is connected ... error in 0.004s And WebSocket client "bob" is connected ... skipped in 0.000s When client "alice" joins room "crypto_room_one" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s And client "bob" joins room "crypto_room_two" with a generated libsodium-style public key ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response field "room_key" for clients "alice" and "bob" should not be equal ... skipped in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Malformed public key material is rejected

error.message:
Handshake status 404 Not Found -+-+- {'connection': 'Keep-Alive', 'server': 'Embedthis-http', 'cache-control': 'no-cache', 'date': 'Mon, 06 Apr 2026 16:04:47 GMT', 'content-length': '173', 'keep-alive': 'timeout=60, max=199'} -+-+- b' Not Found

Access Error: 404 -- Not Found

Cannot open document for: /room
'

testcase.error:

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Malformed public key material is rejected Given a unique room alias "crypto_validation_room" ... passed in 0.001s And WebSocket client "mallory" is connected ... error in 0.005s When client "mallory" joins room "crypto_validation_room" with public key "not-a-valid key!" ... skipped in 0.000s Then the response for client "mallory" should contain ... skipped in 0.000s | field | value | | status | 1 | And the response field "message" for client "mallory" should contain "public_key" ... skipped in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
